items.name: Ralph Lauren Vintage Classic Denim Short
items.description: Polo’s take on a vintage-inspired silhouette features our longest rise, a straight fit, and our widest leg opening. Crafted with nonstretch denim, this pair features cutoff hems and hand-applied paint splattering for a rugged, timeworn look.
